sourceMovie.title: Father Stu
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: Father Stu works as a drama movie with a point of view—fans quote moments, but they also argue about what the film is actually saying about power, desire, or survival. The film leans hard into its core genre, which is exactly what fans say they wanted more of from blockbusters in that era.

recommendations.title: Spotlight
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Father Stu clicked for you, Spotlight (2015) is a strong next stop: both trade in drama, with momentum and clean stakes. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after Father Stu?
faq.answer: Try Spotlight, The Two Popes, Doubt—each shares DNA with Father Stu while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is Father Stu?
faq.answer: Father Stu (2022) is best described as Drama. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is Father Stu worth revisiting?
faq.answer: Viewer scores sit around 7.2/10 on TMDB—high enough that replays are common for people who like this drama lane.
